title: Ice Under Water Pressure
intendedTensionBeat: The lower puppy is water-threatened, but reaching it requires investing in an ice break before the route looks fully open.
intendedReleaseBeat: Breaking the ice in time creates a close but fair rescue before water becomes the dominant threat.
expectedPath: Prioritize the lower water-facing puppy, break the key ice early, stabilize dock once, then extract before pivoting upward.
expectedFailMode: Player waits until the route is visibly urgent before breaking ice, losing too much action tempo to water.
designNotes: Water should sharpen the ice decision, not feel like a timer. Forecast readability matters here.
